changelog:
v1.8.7 (Security & Distribution Edition):
- [SECURITY] API Masking: Implemented password masking (asterisks) for Gemini API Key and Telegram Token fields in the UI.
- [SECURITY] Environment Protection: Verified that .env is excluded from the build to prevent accidental leak of developer keys.
- [STABILITY] Path Resilience: Implemented 'get_resource_path' across core modules to ensure assets load correctly from EXE/Installer.
- [STABILITY] Distribution Paths: Optimized .env saving logic to ensure settings are stored in the local app folder, not system temps.
- [STABILITY] Tools Audit: Resolved relative path and encoding bugs in 'clean_logs.py' and 'bump_version.py' for cross-system stability.
- [INSTALLER] Permission Hardening: Added explicit 'everyone-full' permissions to 'reports' folder in Inno Setup to prevent I/O crashes.
- [INSTALLER] Deep Cleanup: Enhanced uninstaller logic to fully purge .env, .log, and .csv files upon removal.
